title: All CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts: loadBrasileiraoMatches, loadCupMatches, loadLibertadoresMatches, loadHistoricalMatches, loadBRFootballMatches, loadFifaPlayers all implemented with caching

title: Match search functionality
evidence: src/queries.ts:31-73 searchMatches supports team, competition, season, date range filters

title: Player search functionality
evidence: src/queries.ts:362-392 searchPlayers supports name, nationality, club, position, min_overall filters

title: Basic statistics calculations
evidence: src/queries.ts:86-147 getTeamStats calculates wins, losses, draws, goals, points

title: Head-to-head team comparison
evidence: src/queries.ts:163-204 getHeadToHead returns aggregate stats and recent matches between two teams

title: Team name normalization
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts:62-73 normalizeTeamName strips state suffixes, teamMatches handles partial matches

title: Properly formatted responses
evidence: src/index.ts:192-359 formatMatch, formatPlayer, formatStats format all tool responses

title: League standings calculations
evidence: src/queries.ts:208-269 getStandings computes standings sorted by points, goal difference, goals for

title: Competition statistics
evidence: src/queries.ts:309-349 getCompetitionStats calculates total_goals, avg_goals_per_match, home_win_rate

title: Extended match statistics
evidence: src/queries.ts:472-503 getExtendedStats returns corner, shot, and attack averages from BR-Football-Dataset

title: Best teams ranking
evidence: src/queries.ts:396-461 getBestTeams ranks by win rate, supports home/away/overall modes

title: Biggest wins detection
evidence: src/queries.ts:273-293 getBiggestWins returns matches sorted by goal margin

title: Comprehensive test coverage (BDD)
evidence: src/queries.test.ts: 55 tests covering data loading, normalization, match queries, team stats, head-to-head, standings, player searches, statistical analysis

title: 9 MCP tools exported
evidence: src/index.ts:21-190 defines tools for search_matches, get_team_stats, head_to_head, get_standings, get_biggest_wins, get_competition_stats, search_players, get_best_teams, get_extended_stats
suggestion: Implementation exceeds spec by providing standardized MCP interface for all queries
